resources.string: Tracing Paper uses this service to notice presses of the tablet\'s hardware buttons (so the top button can open and close the glass pad), to draw the pad over whatever you\'re reading, and — when you ask for a snapshot — to save a picture of the screen with your notes on it. If you turn on the “Annotate the World” beta in the app, it also replays your finger flicks as touches beneath the glass and listens for how far the app under it scrolled. It never reads what\'s on your screen, and nothing leaves the tablet.
